summary: This chunk discusses ancient Mesopotamian king lists, the identification of historical figures such as Sargina/Sargon with Nimrod, Cushite origins of early Babylonian dynasties, and chronological reconstructions based on Assyriological sources. It contains no references to spirit communication, necromantic traditions, ancestor veneration practices, death rituals, named spirits or deities associated with the dead, ritual procedures, or connections to medieval European necromancy.
